title: CCP-16.2: Implement load metric collection
description: Extend lichen_coap_radio_stats and node_status with channel utilization, per-channel load, balancing score. Update encode functions and Kconfig buffers. Update status_get_cb implementations in apps. Acceptance: CBOR includes load fields, tests pass.
